zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Braye於1501年3月21日出生在英國貝德福爾伊頓 布雷時，她的父親Edmund Bray16歲，母親Jane Halighwell15歲。她於1517年與Sir George Brooke在英國肯特可巴姆結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年11月1日在英國肯特可巴姆享年57歲，埋葬在英國肯特可巴姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Braye于1501年3月21日出生在英国貝德福爾伊頓 布雷时，她的父亲Edmund Bray16岁，母亲Jane Halighwell15岁。她于1517年与Sir George Brooke在英国肯特可巴姆结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1558年11月1日在英国肯特可巴姆享年57岁，埋葬在英国肯特可巴姆。

nameMeanings.name: Braye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Sussex): from the Middle English female personal name Braye. Its origin is unknown but it might derive from Breton bregh ‘fine, brave’.

variants.name: Bray
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Berkshire and Devon. The former is probably named with Old French bray ‘marsh’, the latter from the Cornish element bre ‘hill’.
English: perhaps a topographic name from northern Middle English bra ‘steep (river) bank’ or ‘brow of a hill’, denoting someone who lived at such a place.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy or Picardy called Bray (Eure, Calvados, Aisne, Somme); see 6.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Braye was born on 21 March 1501, in Eaton Bray, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Edmund Bray, was 16 and her mother, Jane Halighwell, was 15. She married Sir George Brooke in 1517, in Cobham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 1 November 1558, in Cobham, Kent, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Cobham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Braye est née le 21 mars 1501, à Eaton Bray, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Bray, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Jane Halighwell, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Brooke en 1517, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 novembre 1558, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Braye am 21. März 1501 in Eaton Bray, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Bray 16 und ihre Mutter Jane Halighwell 15. Sie hat 1517 in Cobham, Kent, England Sir George Brooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. November 1558 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Cobham, Kent, England und wurde in Cobham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Braye è nata il il 21 marzo 1501 nel Eaton Bray, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Edmund Bray, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Jane Halighwell, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir George Brooke nel 1517, nel Cobham, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 novembre 1558, nel Cobham, Kent, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Cobham, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Brayeが1501年3月21日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアエアトン ブレイで生まれた時，父Edmund Brayは16歳，母Jane Halighwellは15歳であった。1517年にイギリスケントコブハムでSir George Brookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年11月1日にイギリスケントコブハムで57歳で死去し，イギリスケントコブハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Braye(이)가 1501년 3월 21일 영국 베드퍼드실르 이턴 브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Bray(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Halighwell(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 켄트 컵함에서 Sir George Brooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 11월 1일 영국 켄트 컵함에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 컵함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Braye nasceu em 21 de março de 1501, em Eaton Bray, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Bray, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Jane Halighwell, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George Brooke em 1517, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1558, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Braye родилась 21 марта 1501 г. в местности эатон брэи, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Bray было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Halighwell, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Brooke в 1517 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 1 ноября 1558 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия.
